stemHtml: Consider a standard atmosphere and NO performance degradation due to increased altitude. During climb through FL260 with a constant CAS of 300 kt the indicated rate of climb is 2000 feet per minute, and the Mach Number is 0.76. You decide to continue the climb and maintain a constant speed of M 0.76. What will happen to the Rate of Climb and TAS?

options.a: Rate of Climb will increase and TAS will increase.
options.b: Rate of Climb will increase and TAS will decrease.
options.c: Rate of Climb will decrease and TAS will increase.
options.d: Rate of Climb will decrease and TAS will decrease.
